name: Fujifilm Instax Mini 12 Camera Case - heyday™ Poppy Flowers
description:
The Fujifilm Instax Mini 12 Camera Case - heyday™ Poppy Flowers adds a botanical touch to your photography gear. Made from durable material, this multicolored case offers reliable protection for your camera. With dimensions of 8.65 inches in height and 9.35 inches in width, it is specifically compatible with the Fujifilm Instax Mini 12 camera, ensuring a snug fit and easy portability.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
